title: Laundry Sorter
description: A practical-life sorting game where kids put laundry into color and clothing-kind baskets.
learningGoals: Build helping-at-home pride through a short laundry routine
interactionModel: sort-into-bins drag or tap-tap clothing cards into laundry baskets
feedbackModel: Correct sorts get pop and sparkle SFX plus spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
